instanceGeneral.aiFeedbackSharingDescription: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
instanceGeneral.backupRetentionDescription: Configure how long automatic database backups are retained. Backups run roughly every hour and are compressed with gzip. Within the daily window all backups are kept; beyond that, one backup per week and one per month are preserved.
instanceGeneral.censorLogsDescription: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.

deployment.authenticatedPrivate: Authenticated private mode requires sign-in and is intended for LAN, VPN, or other private-network deployments.
deployment.authenticatedPublic: Authenticated public mode requires sign-in for board access and is intended for public URLs.
deployment.localTrusted: Local trusted mode is optimized for a local operator. Browser requests run as local board context and no sign-in is required.

instanceGeneral.doNotAllowDescription: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
instanceGeneral.feedbackPromptRetest: To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the feedbackDataSharingPreference key from the instance_settings.general JSON row for this instance, or set it back to "prompt". Unset and "prompt" both mean no default has been chosen yet.
instanceGeneral.keyboardShortcutsDescription: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.
instanceGeneral.noDefaultFeedbackPreference: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
instanceGeneral.signOutDescription: Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page.
instanceGeneral.subtitle: Configure instance-wide preferences including log display, keyboard shortcuts, backup retention, and data sharing.
instanceGeneral.title: General

linux.step1: Open a terminal and navigate to the directory with cd.
linux.step2: Run pwd to print the full path.
linux.step3: Copy the output and paste here.
linux.tip: In most file managers, Ctrl+L reveals the full path in the address bar.

mac.step1: Open Finder and navigate to the folder.
mac.step3: Hold the Option (⌥) key - "Copy" changes to "Copy as Pathname".
mac.step4: Click "Copy as Pathname", then paste here.
mac.tip: You can also open Terminal, type cd, drag the folder into the terminal window, and press Enter. Then type pwd to see the full path.

pathInstructionsModal.title: How to get a full path

windows.step1: Open File Explorer and navigate to the folder.
windows.step2: Click in the address bar at the top - the full path will appear.
windows.step3: Copy the path, then paste here.
windows.tip: Alternatively, hold Shift and right-click the folder, then select "Copy as path".

signingModeBearerDescription: Expect a shared bearer token in the Authorization header.
signingModeGithubDescription: Accept GitHub-style X-Hub-Signature-256 header (HMAC over raw body, no timestamp).
signingModeHmacDescription: Expect an HMAC SHA-256 signature over the request using the shared secret.
signingModeNoneDescription: No authentication. The webhook URL itself acts as a shared secret.
signInRequiredDescription: Sign in or create an account before submitting a human join request.
skillCreatedBody: {name} is now editable in the Paperclip workspace.
skillRemovedBody: {name} was removed from the company skill library.
skillsUnsupported: Paperclip cannot manage skills for this adapter yet. Manage them in the adapter directly.

sourceSectionDescription: Choose a GitHub repo or upload a local Paperclip zip package.

sourceTypeDescription.localPath: A local path Paperclip can use directly.

sourceTypeDescription.remoteManaged: A hosted workspace tracked by external reference.
